<<<<<<< SEARCH
def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of triples about a monument (or related entity) into a single
    fluent sentence. All triples are combined; each predicate is expressed with a
    suitable phrase.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Group triples by subject to handle related entities
    subject_triples: dict[str, list[Triple]] = {}
    for triple in triples:
        if triple.subject not in subject_triples:
            subject_triples[triple.subject] = []
        subject_triples[triple.subject].append(triple)

    # Find the monument as the main subject
    main_subject = None
    for subj in subject_triples.keys():
        if "Monument" in subj or "Memorial" in subj or "Plack" in subj:
            main_subject = subj
            break
    if main_subject is None:
        main_subject = triples[0].subject

    # Collect all information for the main subject
    location_parts: list[str] = []
    clauses: list[str] = []
    related_info: list[str] = []

    for subject, sub_triples in subject_triples.items():
        for triple in sub_triples:
            p = triple.predicate
            o = triple.object.strip('"')

            if subject == main_subject:
                # Handle location hierarchy
                if p == "location":
                    location_parts.append(o)
                elif p == "municipality":
                    location_parts.append(o)
                elif p == "state":
                    location_parts.append(f"in the state of {o}")
                elif p == "country":
                    location_parts.append(f"in {o}")
                elif p == "district":
                    location_parts.append(f"in the district of {o}")
                # Handle other attributes
                elif p == "category":
                    clauses.append(f"is a {o}")
                elif p in ("established", "foundingDate"):
                    clauses.append(f"was established in {o}")
                elif p == "inaugurationDate":
                    clauses.append(f"was inaugurated on {o}")
                elif p in ("owner", "owningOrganisation"):
                    clauses.append(f"is owned by {o}")
                elif p == "dedicatedTo":
                    clauses.append(f"is dedicated to {o}")
                elif p == "designer":
                    clauses.append(f"was designed by {o}")
                elif p == "material":
                    clauses.append(f"is made of {o}")
                elif p == "nativeName":
                    clauses.append(f'native name is "{o}"')
                elif p == "nearestCity":
                    clauses.append(f"nearest city is {o}")
                elif p == "ethnicGroup":
                    clauses.append(f"associated with the {o}")
                elif p == "language":
                    clauses.append(f"language is {o}")
                elif p == "religion":
                    clauses.append(f"religion is {o}")
                elif p == "currency":
                    clauses.append(f"currency is {o}")
                elif p == "largestCity":
                    clauses.append(f"largest city is {o}")
                elif p == "leader":
                    clauses.append(f"leader is {o}")
                elif p == "leaderTitle":
                    clauses.append(f"leader title is {o}")
            else:
                # Handle related entity info (country, capital, etc.)
                if p == "capital":
                    related_info.append(f"{subject}, where the capital is {o}")
                elif p == "legislature":
                    related_info.append(f"{subject} has legislature {o}")
                elif p == "ethnicGroup":
                    related_info.append(f"{subject} has {o}")
                elif p == "language":
                    related_info.append(f"{subject} speaks {o}")
                elif p == "religion":
                    related_info.append(f"{subject} follows {o}")
                elif p == "currency":
                    related_info.append(f"{subject} uses {o}")
                elif p == "largestCity":
                    related_info.append(f"{subject}'s largest city is {o}")
                elif p == "leader":
                    related_info.append(f"{subject}'s leader is {o}")
                elif p == "leaderTitle":
                    related_info.append(f"{subject}'s leader title is {o}")
                elif p == "hasToItsNorth":
                    related_info.append(f"to its north is {o}")
                elif p == "hasToItsSouthwest":
                    related_info.append(f"to its southwest is {o}")
                elif p == "hasToItsWest":
                    related_info.append(f"to its west is {o}")
                elif p == "hasToItsSoutheast":
                    related_info.append(f"to its southeast is {o}")

    # Build the location chain
    location_str = ""
    if location_parts:
        if len(location_parts) == 1:
            location_str = f"is located in {location_parts[0]}"
        else:
            # Join location parts with commas
            loc_text = ", ".join(location_parts)
            location_str = f"is located in {loc_text}"

    # Build the final sentence
    sentence_parts: list[str] = [main_subject]

    if location_str:
        sentence_parts.append(location_str)

    if clauses:
        if len(clauses) == 1:
            sentence_parts.append(clauses[0])
        else:
            sentence_parts.append(", ".join(clauses))

    if related_info:
        sentence_parts.append(", " + ", ".join(related_info))

    # Join all parts
    sentence = ", ".join(sentence_parts) + "."

    return sentence
=======
def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of triples about a monument (or related entity) into a single
    fluent sentence. All triples are combined; each predicate is expressed with a
    suitable phrase.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Group triples by subject to handle related entities
    subject_triples: dict[str, list[Triple]] = {}
    for triple in triples:
        if triple.subject not in subject_triples:
            subject_triples[triple.subject] = []
        subject_triples[triple.subject].append(triple)

    # Find the monument as the main subject
    main_subject = None
    for subj in subject_triples.keys():
        if "Monument" in subj or "Memorial" in subj or "Plack" in subj:
            main_subject = subj
            break
    if main_subject is None:
        main_subject = triples[0].subject

    # Collect all information for the main subject
    location_info: list[str] = []
    attributes: list[str] = []
    related_entities: dict[str, dict] = {}  # Track related entities and their info

    for subject, sub_triples in subject_triples.items():
        for triple in sub_triples:
            p = triple.predicate
            o = triple.object.strip('"')

            if subject == main_subject:
                # Handle location hierarchy
                if p == "location":
                    location_info.append(("location", o))
                elif p == "municipality":
                    location_info.append(("municipality", o))
                elif p == "state":
                    location_info.append(("state", o))
                elif p == "country":
                    location_info.append(("country", o))
                elif p == "district":
                    location_info.append(("district", o))
                # Handle other attributes
                elif p == "category":
                    attributes.append(f"is a {o}")
                elif p in ("established", "foundingDate"):
                    attributes.append(f"was established in {o}")
                elif p == "inaugurationDate":
                    attributes.append(f"was inaugurated on {o}")
                elif p in ("owner", "owningOrganisation"):
                    attributes.append(f"is owned by {o}")
                elif p == "dedicatedTo":
                    attributes.append(f"is dedicated to {o}")
                elif p == "designer":
                    attributes.append(f"was designed by {o}")
                elif p == "material":
                    attributes.append(f"is made of {o}")
                elif p == "nativeName":
                    attributes.append(f'with native name "{o}"')
                elif p == "nearestCity":
                    attributes.append(f"nearest city is {o}")
                elif p == "ethnicGroup":
                    attributes.append(f"associated with the {o}")
                elif p == "language":
                    attributes.append(f"language is {o}")
                elif p == "religion":
                    attributes.append(f"religion is {o}")
                elif p == "currency":
                    attributes.append(f"currency is {o}")
                elif p == "largestCity":
                    attributes.append(f"largest city is {o}")
                elif p == "leader":
                    attributes.append(f"leader is {o}")
                elif p == "leaderTitle":
                    attributes.append(f"leader title is {o}")
            else:
                # Track related entity information
                if subject not in related_entities:
                    related_entities[subject] = {}
                related_entities[subject][p] = o

    # Build location phrase
    location_phrase = ""
    if location_info:
        loc_parts = []
        country = None
        state = None
        district = None
        municipality = None
        location = None
        
        for loc_type, value in location_info:
            if loc_type == "country":
                country = value
            elif loc_type == "state":
                state = value
            elif loc_type == "district":
                district = value
            elif loc_type == "municipality":
                municipality = value
            elif loc_type == "location":
                location = value
        
        # Build location hierarchy
        if district:
            loc_parts.append(f"in the district of {district}")
        if location:
            loc_parts.append(f"in {location}")
        if municipality:
            loc_parts.append(f"municipality of {municipality}")
        if state:
            loc_parts.append(f"in the state of {state}")
        if country:
            loc_parts.append(f"in {country}")
        
        if loc_parts:
            location_phrase = "which is " + ", ".join(loc_parts)
        else:
            location_phrase = "located in " + ", ".join([v for _, v in location_info])

    # Build related entity phrases (country info, etc.)
    related_phrases = []
    for entity, info in related_entities.items():
        parts = []
        if "capital" in info:
            parts.append(f"where the capital is {info['capital']}")
        if "leader" in info:
            parts.append(f"leader is {info['leader']}")
        if "leaderTitle" in info:
            parts.append(f"leader title is {info['leaderTitle']}")
        if "legislature" in info:
            parts.append(f"legislature is {info['legislature']}")
        if "currency" in info:
            parts.append(f"uses {info['currency']}")
        if "largestCity" in info:
            parts.append(f"largest city is {info['largestCity']}")
        
        if parts:
            related_phrases.append(f"{entity}, " + ", ".join(parts))

    # Build the final sentence
    parts = [main_subject]
    
    if location_phrase:
        parts.append(location_phrase)
    
    if attributes:
        parts.append(", ".join(attributes))
    
    if related_phrases:
        parts.append(", " + ", ".join(related_phrases))
    
    # Join all parts
    sentence = ", ".join(parts) + "."
    return sentence
>>>>>>> REPLACE
